title: [LLHD] HoistSignals crash on multiple drives with different delays

features.name: multiple delayed assignments to same signal in procedure
features.description: Code should include multiple non-blocking assignments to the same signal variable with different delay values (#) inside a procedural block

features.name: time literals with different delay values
features.description: Code should include multiple time literal constants with different delay values used in delayed assignments

features.name: signal driven in multiple procedural blocks
features.description: Code should include a signal variable that is assigned in multiple procedural contexts with different timing controls
